title: So, you think you can write an EVM decompiler? - Yannis Smaragdakis
description:
EVM decompilation is useful for a whole lot of tasks: automatically analysing all deployed smart contracts, understanding smart contracts without published source, investigating hacks or bots, and so much more.

In this talk, Yannis Smaragdakis from Dedaub discussed the core difficulties of EVM decompilation and explain why it is a tough nut to crack.
